name: Alcohol-Impaired Driving
description: Crashes involving a driver or non-motorist with a positive BAC or suspected alcohol impairment.

name: Drug-Impaired Driving
description: Crashes where a person-level drug indicator is present.

name: Speeding-Related
description: Crashes flagged A_SPCRA in FARS acc_aux — racing, exceeding limits, or speed too fast for conditions.

name: Distracted Driving
description: Crashes flagged A_DIST — driver inattention, cell phone use, or other distraction.

name: Drowsy/Fatigued Driving
description: Crashes where drowsiness or fatigue was a contributing factor (A_DROWSY).

name: Seatbelt Non-Use
description: Crashes with at least one occupant fatality where no seatbelt was used.

name: Pedestrian Fatality
description: Crashes resulting in a pedestrian fatality (A_PED_F).

name: Hit-and-Run
description: Crashes where a driver fled the scene (A_HR).
